projects.title: Credit Risk & Loan Default Prediction
projects.problem: A Fintech NBFC faced a 14% NPA rate and needed to identify high-risk segments without overhauling core ML infrastructure.
projects.approach: Extracted 50K+ records via PostgreSQL. Engineered a behavioral risk score using Python (Random Forest) and built a dynamic monitoring dashboard in Power BI.
projects.impact: Built a predictive model that identified high-risk segments, demonstrating a potential 11% NPA reduction strategy.

projects.title: E-Commerce Funnel & Revenue Leakage
projects.problem: Despite a 40% YoY traffic increase, checkout conversion remained stagnant.
projects.approach: Wrote complex SQL window functions to map the user journey (View → Cart → Checkout). Visualized drop-off points in Tableau.
projects.impact: Formulated a UI redesign strategy targeting a simulated ₹2.3Cr/month revenue leakage to lift conversions.

projects.title: SaaS Customer Churn Prediction
projects.problem: A B2B SaaS platform was bleeding accounts at an unsustainable 5.2% monthly churn rate.
projects.approach: Analyzed login frequency and feature adoption using Python. Created an Account Health Score matrix deployed via Power BI.
projects.impact: Prototyped an early-warning system capable of identifying 73% of at-risk accounts 30 days in advance.
